title: Delta's MedKit
description: A mod containing many useful medicinal items that can help you on your journeys, or to play the doctor to assist your friends, or even as a mage looking to help those in need.
body: Ever wanted to play the doctor? Or wanted some more fun ways to heal then just eating? Try out this mod! Among the medkit, an item designed for slow but reliable healing, it also includes other essentials such as bandages or syringes with herbal medicine as well as a healing spell which is sure to spice up your gameplay.
